name: Catchup
author: Nick Bentley (2010) / AGP port
description: Nick Bentley's group-building game on a hexagon of 61 hexes with a self-balancing 'catch-up' mechanism: place 1 stone on the very first move, then 2 per turn, or up to 3 when your opponent just increased their score to at least yours. The board fills up; the player whose largest connected group is biggest wins, with ties broken by successively smaller groups (no draws).
